title: houmao-email-metadata
description: Stable in-body metadata block carried by every DeepResearch templated mail. Embedded as `meta` in each family schema (kept inline there for self-contained validation; this file is the authority).

loop_id.description: Stable correlation id == quest_id; idempotency scope for handoff_id.

handoff_id.description: Stable; resends reuse it for dedup.

continuation_lane.description: Self-wakeup lane; reserved for future multi-thread continuation.
